groups.text: It is currently 19 degrees and cloudy in Berlin-Tempelhof.
With the morning weather set, here is the news.

NVIDIA is aggressively expanding its footprint in sovereign AI and autonomous reasoning. CEO Jensen Huang is visiting Seoul to strengthen ties with South Korea's robotics sectors and national AI infrastructure. On the technical side, the company has launched Nemotron 3 Ultra to improve the efficiency of long-running AI agents. This model specifically targets the growth of token counts in complex, multi-turn workflows. NVIDIA also released Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety via Hugging Face, providing customizable multimodal safety filters for global enterprises.

These shifts in technology coincide with strategic geopolitical movements in Europe. European leaders are meeting in Montenegro to advance EU accession plans. While Montenegro is a primary candidate, Ukraine and Moldova are also seeking paths toward membership to stabilize the region.

However, the economic foundation of the currency union shows signs of fragility. The Eurozone economy unexpectedly contracted by 0.2 percent in the first quarter. This decline was heavily influenced by a massive 12.1 percent drop in Ireland's GDP following data revisions.

Despite the broader contraction, the German DAX index has defended its previous gains. Investors remain cautious, keeping a close eye on the war in Ukraine and new labor market data from the United States.
After the headlines, back to the weather.
This afternoon will be cloudy with temperatures between 19 and 21 degrees.
And from the weather, a quick look at the calendar.

On your calendar today: personal calendar: all day: Department Retro, Fronleichnam at BY, BW, HE, NW, RP, SL, and Fronleichnam at HE, BW, BY, NW, RP, SL, at 10:00, Mandatory Security Awareness Training, at 13:00, NAS Brainstorm, at 17:00, Friday beer & Cocktails, and at 19:00, Höfische.
And that's it for your personal morning broadcast.
[mature adult voice, intensely emotional, tender, radiant; hold a long breath after Rise] Rise... and shine.
[very very long pause before speaking; then mature adult voice, most emotional, strong, warm, radiant, deeply encouraging; hold a long breath after Rise] Rise... and shine.
